query: smeared blurred face featureless dissolved portrait abstraction
message: sub:bad_or_no_details/smeared_face — anti_aesthetic — dissolved portraits, featureless faces, painterly distortions

response.objective_caption: A monochrome close-up of a human face with the mouth open, showing elongated lines of light and shadow that radiate outward from the center and alter the facial contours across the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black-and-white close-up of a human face with the mouth open in an expression of intense distress, captured with extreme intentional motion blur that creates radiating streaks of light and shadow, smearing the facial features into abstract lines and amplifying the sense of anguish and chaotic movement.
